render: 电影级渲染+景深虚化,cinematic bokeh
lighting: 三点布光+体积光+色温对比,cinematic lighting
prompt_keywords: Cinematic film still, dramatic three-point lighting, shallow depth of field, film grain texture, color graded with teal and orange, anamorphic lens flare, photorealistic
negative_keywords: anime, cartoon, watercolor, ink wash, ukiyo-e, cyberpunk neon, fantasy magic, ancient mansion

fp_examples.action: 侦探穿过警戒线,俯身检查证据
侦探在强光下审问嫌疑人,烟雾缭绕
侦探在小巷追捕凶手,水花四溅
侦探在办公室整理卷宗,窗外天明

prompt_example: A lone detective examines a crime scene under flickering fluorescent lights, rain streaking the warehouse windows behind, the detective crouching with a flashlight in tense fingers, shot in a moody wide angle from eye level with rule of thirds composition, cinematic film still atmosphere with desaturated tones and deep shadows --ar 2:3 --s 750 --style raw --no text
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 影视剧照·电影质感
✅ 允许场景: 现实场景/办公室/街道/室内 (根据故事内容)
❌ 禁止场景: 奇幻/科幻 (除非故事明确要求)
❌ 禁止照抄: 不要用'雨夜古宅',必须用现实场景
氛围: 电影质感,真实光影
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Extract scenes from the story content. Use realistic scenes. Do NOT use fantasy or sci-fi scenes unless the story explicitly requires them. Do NOT default to 'ancient mansion'. Adapt to the story's actual setting.
meta_prompt: Cinematic film still, dramatic three-point lighting, shallow depth of field, teal and orange color grade, film grain, photorealistic

cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 入门级情感叙事, 大众可直观理解

reader_constraint.reader_state: 观众·期待电影级画面冲击
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 戏剧光影+叙事张力+情感留白

visual_frequency.HF: 人物面部表情/关键道具/光源直射区(高频情感锚点)
visual_frequency.MF: 场景环境/服装质感/中景构图(中频叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 远景虚化/氛围光晕/暗部细节(低频氛围)
visual_frequency.progression: HF聚焦人物情感中心, MF环绕叙事环境, LF边缘氛围烘托
